category.name: Vegetables
category.special_instructions: All vegetable dishes can be prepared with tofu upon request.

menu_items.name: Broccoli in Garlic Sauce
menu_items.description: Tender broccoli florets stir-fried in a savory garlic sauce.

menu_items.name: Mixed Vegetables
menu_items.description: A colorful medley of seasonal vegetables wok-tossed in a light sauce.

menu_items.name: Eggplant in Garlic Sauce
menu_items.description: Soft braised eggplant in a fragrant spicy garlic sauce.

menu_items.name: Sautéed String Beans
menu_items.description: Crispy string beans dry-fried with garlic and a touch of chili.

menu_items.name: Vegetarian Delight
menu_items.description: A generous mix of mushrooms, tofu, baby corn, and fresh vegetables.

menu_items.name: Snow Peas with Mushrooms
menu_items.description: Crisp snow peas stir-fried with fragrant mushrooms in light oyster sauce.
